explanations.default: Matched to the strongest available support in this dataset for your measured profile.
explanations.perinatal: Matched to evidence where pregnancy or the postpartum period is part of the measured profile.
explanations.medical_comorbidity: Matched to evidence where depression is linked with a long-term physical health condition.
explanations.recurrent_course: Matched to evidence from recurrent or longer-running depression profiles where available.
explanations.activation: Matched because your profile points toward getting active and rebuilding routines.
explanations.relationship_focused: Matched because your profile points toward relationship, role, or loneliness-related stress.
explanations.health_condition_coping: Matched because your profile points toward coping with depression linked to physical health.

cautions.unconfirmed_diagnosis: Confidence is lower because depression has not been clinically confirmed.
cautions.unknown_diagnosis: Confidence is lower because the diagnosis details are still unclear.
cautions.high_suicidal_ideation: Extra clinical support may be important because you reported frequent thoughts of self-harm.
cautions.possible_mania: A clinician should check whether mood elevation symptoms need a fuller assessment.
cautions.possible_psychosis: A clinician should review unusual experiences before relying on a treatment match alone.
cautions.many_unknown_answers: Confidence is lower because several answers were uncertain or left unspecified.
